book_search.no_results: I couldn't find any books matching '{query}'. Try using different keywords or check the spelling.
book_search.follow_up: You can ask me about a specific book's availability, location, or details.

library_hours.main:
🕐 **Library Hours**

**Weekdays (Mon-Fri):** 8:00 AM - 10:00 PM
**Weekends (Sat-Sun):** 10:00 AM - 8:00 PM

**Special Hours:**
• Exam Period: 7:00 AM - 12:00 AM
• Holidays: Closed

Current time: {current_time}
library_hours.follow_up: Would you like to know about specific services or holiday schedules? (reply 'yes' or 'no')

borrowing_info.main:
📚 **Borrowing Policy**

**Students:**
• Maximum books: 5
• Loan period: 14 days
• Renewals: 1 renewal (if no holds)

**Staff:**
• Maximum books: 10
• Loan period: 30 days
• Renewals: 2 renewals

**Overdue Fines:** ₦50 per day per book
borrowing_info.follow_up: Need to know how to renew or check your due dates? (reply 'yes' or 'no')

policy_query.follow_up: Is there a specific aspect of the policy you'd like clarified? (reply 'yes' and tell me what)

research_help.main:
I can help you with research! Here are some resources:

**Databases Available:**
• JSTOR (Arts & Sciences)
• IEEE Xplore (Engineering)
• ScienceDirect (Science)
• SpringerLink (All disciplines)
• PubMed (Medicine)

**Research Guides:** Available for each department on the library website.
research_help.follow_up: Would you like help with a specific database or finding articles on a topic? (reply 'yes' and tell me the topic)

citation_help.main:
**Citation Styles Support**

The library provides help with:
• APA 7th Edition
• MLA 9th Edition
• Chicago 17th Edition
• IEEE

**Resources:**
• Citation guides at reference desk
• Online citation generators on library website
• Zotero/Mendeley workshops

Example {style} citation for a book:
{example}
citation_help.follow_up: Need help with a specific citation or formatting question? (reply 'yes' and tell me the citation)

general_info.main:
I understand you're asking about {topic}. Here's what I can tell you:

{information}
general_info.follow_up: Is this what you were looking for? (reply 'yes' or 'no', or ask for more details)

clarification.main: I want to make sure I understand correctly. Are you asking about (1) {topic1} or (2) {topic2}? (reply with 1 or 2)
clarification.follow_up: Please rephrase your question or provide more details.

fallback.main: I'm not sure I fully understand your question about {topic}. Could you provide more details or rephrase it?
fallback.follow_up:
I can help you with:
• Finding books and articles
• Library hours and policies
• Borrowing and returning items
• Research and citation help
• Library services and facilities

What would you like help with?

greeting.main:
👋 I'm the **Library AI Assistant**.

I can help you with:
• 🔍 Finding books and resources
• 🕐 Library hours and policies
• 📚 Research and database access
• 📖 Citation and reference help
• ℹ️ General library information

**How can I assist you today?**
greeting.follow_up:
Try asking me something like:
"What are the library hours?"
"How do I borrow a book?"
"Find books about computer science"

relevance.main:
I can help you with:
• 🔍 Finding books and resources
• 🕐 Library hours and policies

relevance.follow_up:
Try asking me something like:

introduction.follow_up: Try asking me something like: what can you do?

about_you.main: I'm the Library AI Assistant, an AI-powered chatbot designed to help students, faculty, and visitors with their library needs. I'm here to make it easier for you to access library resources and services.
about_you.follow_up: I can help you find books, check library hours, understand borrowing policies, research topics, and much more. What would you like to know?

bot_identity.main: I was created by the Library AI team to assist users like you. I'm an AI assistant designed to provide quick answers to common library questions and help guide you to the resources you need.
bot_identity.follow_up: My purpose is to make library services more accessible and easier to navigate. Is there anything specific I can help you with?

bot_purpose.main:
As the Library AI Assistant, I help you with:

• Finding books and resources in our catalog
• Checking library hours and schedules
• Understanding borrowing and renewal policies
• Research assistance and database guidance
• Citation help and reference services
• Answering general library questions
bot_purpose.follow_up: Think of me as your first point of contact for library-related queries. How can I assist you today?

contact_info.follow_up: Need assistance with a specific department?

borrow_request.main: I'd be happy to help you borrow a book! To process your request, I'll need some information. Could you please provide the title or ISBN of the book you'd like to borrow?
borrow_request.follow_up: Once you provide the book details, I can submit a borrow request on your behalf.

reservation.main: I can help you reserve a book! To make a reservation, I'll need the book title or ISBN. Would you like me to search for a specific book first?
reservation.follow_up: You can also check the book's availability before making a reservation.

book_reservation.main: I'd be happy to help you reserve a book! To make a reservation, I'll need the book title or ISBN. What book would you like to reserve?
book_reservation.follow_up: You can also check the book's availability before making a reservation.
book_reservation.found: I found the following book(s). Reply with the number (e.g., '1') to reserve, or 'search' to try a different search.
book_reservation.not_found: I couldn't find a book matching '{book_title}'. Would you like to try a different search? (reply 'yes' or provide a different title)
book_reservation.unavailable:
I'm sorry, '{title}' by {author} is currently checked out.

Would you like me to place a hold (reservation) for when it becomes available? (reply 'yes' or 'no')

my_borrows.main:
To check your current borrow status, please log into your account and visit the 'My Borrow Requests' page. There you can see:

• Books you're currently borrowing
• Due dates
• Renewal options
• Borrowing history
my_borrows.follow_up: Would you like me to help you with anything else related to your account?

my_reservations.main:
To view your reservations, please check the 'My Borrow Requests' page in your account. You can see:

• Active reservations
• Ready for pickup items
• Reservation expiry dates
• Cancel or modify options

error.main: I apologize, but I encountered an error while processing your request. Please try again or contact library staff for assistance.
error.follow_up: You can try rephrasing your question or ask about a different topic.
